meanings.definition: remove from a certain place, environment, or mental or emotional state; transport into a new location or state
examples: Their dreams carried the Romantics away into distant lands
The car carried us off to the meeting
I'll take you away on a holiday
I got carried away when I saw the dead man and I started to cry

meanings.definition: remove something concrete, as by lifting, pushing, or taking off, or remove something abstract
examples: Remove the dirty dishes from the table
take the gun from your pocket
This machine withdraws heat from the environment
take out the chicken after adding the vegetables

meanings.definition: take from a person or place
examples: We took the abused child away from its parents

meanings.definition: buy and consume food from a restaurant or establishment that sells prepared food
examples: We'll take out pizza, since I am too tired to cook
The death of her mother removed the last obstacle to their marriage

meanings.definition: take away a part from; diminish
examples: His bad manners detract from his good character
